task_updates.executor_notes: Added useWaveformData with module-level decoded AudioBuffer caching, RMS bucket downsampling, trim/speed-aware audible-window selection, and graceful null returns for undefined src, fetch/decode failures, and empty buffers. Verified with the new hook test module plus focused failure-mode coverage.

Added WaveformOverlay as a memoized mirrored SVG path overlay with absolute positioning, pointer-events disabled, preserveAspectRatio="none", and semi-transparent currentColor fill. Verified with a dedicated component test module that checks the non-interactive overlay structure.

ClipAction now accepts audioSrc and clipWidth, computes bucket count from clip width, calls useWaveformData, renders WaveformOverlay only when waveform data exists, and keeps the label/icon above the overlay with z-indexed content. Verified by extending the full ClipAction test module to cover waveform gating and the React.memo comparator behavior for audioSrc and clipWidth.

TimelineEditor now resolves waveform eligibility from the active resolved clip/track pair and passes both audioSrc and clipWidth into ClipAction. Verified with TimelineEditor tests covering audio-track, visual-video, muted detach-audio, and text/effect exclusions, plus a TimelineCanvas test confirming getActionRender receives the computed clip width.

Ran the full video-editor Vitest sweep successfully: 32 test files and 125 tests passed. Created a throwaway verification file for useWaveformData, confirmed a mock audio URL resolves to a non-null two-bucket waveform ([0.5, 1]), ran it successfully, and deleted the file. Smoke-check status: (1) automated coverage for audible audio-track clips, (2) automated coverage for visual video clips with audio, (3) automated detach-audio verification, (4) automated text/effect exclusion coverage, (5) clip-width/bucket-count wiring verified by TimelineCanvas + ClipAction tests but no live zoom UI run, (6) trim handling verified by useWaveformData tests, (7) mute/volume-zero gating verified by TimelineEditor tests, (8) no headless performance profiler or visual jank measurement was available for 10+ clips.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Covered undefined src, failed fetch, decode rejection, and zero-length buffers in useWaveformData.test.tsx; each path settles to { waveform: null, loading: false } without throwing.

WaveformOverlay renders inside an absolute inset-0 wrapper with pointer-events-none and opacity-25, and its SVG path string is memoized with useMemo so it can sit behind later clip content without intercepting interaction.

ClipAction.test.tsx now checks that the overlay is absent when audioSrc is undefined, appears when audioSrc is provided, and that rerenders happen when audioSrc or clipWidth changes so areClipActionPropsEqual does not stale the waveform props.

resolveWaveformAudioSrc now enforces: audio tracks require a non-zero clip volume, visual tracks require video/* MIME plus volume > 0, and text/effect clips always return undefined; TimelineEditor.test.ts also covers the detach-audio case where the muted visual clip loses its waveform and the new audio clip keeps it.

All existing video-editor tests passed (32 files / 125 tests). The detach-audio -> waveform-moves path is covered by the TimelineEditor detach case. No visible-jank claim was directly profiled in this headless terminal session; only functional multi-module regression coverage was completed.
